text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... And after you made such a case about
how I should be careful of potential injuries...
choice_data_list: I should've been more vigilant too...
I should've been more vigilant too...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: This is going to worry my security team again...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...No. At times like these, I probably ought to put
them at ease by showing them I can still move
about.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It could be like rehabilitation. ...What do you
think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It could be like rehabilitation. ...What do you
think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But... what if they say I shouldn't enter any more
races?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that, even then, I'm not willing to let her
put herself in danger. I also explain that if she's
trying to put minds at ease, then overexerting
herself will have the opposite effect.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. You're totally right. I think I was
just panicked.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for stopping me, but I wish you hadn't
seen that side of me. It's pitiful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion puts on a vaguely dispirited smile
and agrees to take time off to rest.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes, of cour—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Excuse me... I'm all right. But if it hurts this
much, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that if she rests properly and lets her
injury heal, she should be fine. I also tell her that
I'll explain the situation to her security team
myself so she doesn't need to worry about that.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...My apologies. I caused more trouble for you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion goes quiet as if she's trying to stifle
her sighs.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes! It'll be fine, trust me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? Pulled it off without a hitch,
didn't I? Besides, if I run in here, it'll be even safer
than running outside.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
choice_data_list:
If it hurts her even a little, we'll switch to
classroom study.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's a grand idea. ♪ We could do
visualization exercises!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Huh... I have a clear idea of just how passionate
you both are now. All the same, I would ask you
to remain cautious.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, Trainer! Let's work hard at whatever
training we can! ♪ Huzzah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A dazzling smile lights up Fine Motion's face. I'd
better come up with a training plan fast!
